data.title: Over 800 New Generation Projects Seek To Connect Under PJM's Reformed Process
data.description: PJM Interconnection revealed today that 811 new generation projects have been approved through a first-ready, first-served cycle. These projects are expected to generate 220 gigawatts of power. This decision aims to eliminate backlogs and provide a quicker and more predictable process for resources seeking to connect to the grid.

data.title: EcoFresh by Microban International Earns USDA Certified Biobased Product Label
data.description: A company based in Huntersville, North Carolina, known for its dedication to advancing innovative technologies while prioritizing environmental sustainability, has recently been recognized for its odor-control technology. As of April 29, 2026, Microban International, a prominent player in product protection solutions worldwide, has achieved success in the United States market. This signifies the company's ongoing commitment to developing cutting-edge products that are eco-friendly and effective.

data.title: Anaconda Acquires Outerbounds to Power End-to End, Secure-by-Default AI-Native Development at Enterprise Scale
data.description: Anaconda Inc., a prominent AI-native development platform based in Austin, Texas, has revealed the procurement of Outerbounds, the firm responsible for Metaflow, a well-regarded open-source AI/ML orchestration framework utilized by leading engineering organizations globally. This includes big names like Realtor.com, GE HealthCare, and Warner Brothers. The acquisition represents a pivotal moment in Anaconda's progression from being recognized as the world's top foundation for enterprise AI development.

data.title: Kiddom Named 2026 EdTech Trendsetter as Districts Shift Toward Coherent Instructional Systems
data.description: In San Francisco, Kiddom, the creator of Learning Intelligence Technology (LIT), received recognition in three categories at the 2026 EdTech Awards by EdTech Digest. This includes winning the prestigious EdTech Trendsetter Award. According to Abbas Manjee, Co-Founder and Chief Academic Officer at Kiddom, K–12 education has primarily focused on enhancing curriculum quality, with less emphasis on the necessary delivery infrastructure. The key missing component has been coherence, aiming to connect student learning experiences effectively.

data.title: Seaside LNG Announces Expanded C-suite Leadership Team
data.description: A new C-suite leadership team has been appointed by Seaside LNG, the leading integrated LNG bunkering platform in North America based in Houston. The team will oversee the company's operations and growth in the LNG sector. This move aims to strengthen Seaside LNG's position in the market and drive further success.

data.title: Axoft Secures $55M Series A to Advance Clinical Trials Globally for its Bio-Inspired, Implantable Brain-Computer Interface
data.description: A neurotechnology company based in Cambridge, Axoft, has successfully secured $55 million in an oversubscribed Series A funding round. The funding was led by C.P. Group Innovation, with participation from other key investors including Alumni Ventures, the Stanford President’s Venture Fund, Hillhouse Investment, and Gaorong Ventures. This brings Axoft's total funding raised to over $60 million. The company plans to utilize this capital to expand its ongoing clinical trials worldwide and advance the process of obtaining U.S. regulatory approval for its implantable Brain-Computer Interface technology.

data.title: OpenGov Brings AI to Local and State Government
data.description: During the annual OpenGov conference in San Francisco on April 29, 2026, the company revealed its AI-native Public Service Platform. This launch included updates to its ERP and HCM systems, along with the integration of a built-in AI assistant. This expansion marks a significant step for OpenGov as it aims to streamline public services and improve efficiency.

data.title: ADC Files Motion to Intervene in Defense of Medford's Landmark Values-Aligned Investment Ordinance
data.description: A legal organization, the American-Arab Anti-Discrimination Committee (ADC), is taking action to defend municipal autonomy against interference from out-of-state foundations. The ADC is providing co-counsel in a Motion seeking to uphold a democratically enacted law. The announcement was made on April 29, 2026, in Medford, Massachusetts.

data.title: T. ROWE PRICE EXPLORES LEADERSHIP AND INNOVATION IN AN INCREASINGLY COMPLEX NATIONAL SECURITY LANDSCAPE WITH NORTHROP GRUMMAN CEO KATHY WARDEN
data.description: The latest episode of "The Angle" by T. Rowe Price focuses on key priorities impacting the future of national defense. T. Rowe Price, a prominent global investment management firm specializing in retirement solutions, highlighted speed-to-deliver, artificial intelligence (AI), autonomy, and space as crucial factors in shaping defense strategies. The episode was released on April 29, 2026, and delves into the significance of these themes in the evolving landscape of national security.

data.title: Barchart and Grão Direto Expand Global Access to Brazil's Physical Grain Market Data
data.description: Grão Direto, the top digital grain trading platform in Latin America, has partnered with Barchart to distribute regional price data and exclusive Brazilian soybean and corn indices globally through the Grainsights platform. This collaboration, announced on April 29, 2026 in Chicago, will facilitate the dissemination of important agricultural information to an international audience.
